exam_price_notes: Coursera subscription ~$49/month; financial aid available; earns 30% discount toward CompTIA Security+ exam
id_requirements: Coursera account; Google certificate credential shared via Credly badge upon completion
exam_rules: No single timed proctored exam. Assessment is embedded across courses: multiple-choice quizzes (≥80% to pass), hands-on labs, peer-reviewed projects, and a capstone project. Learners can retry quizzes up to 3 times per attempt.
renewal_options: Certificates do not expire; no formal renewal required. Google recommends keeping skills current through continued learning.

prerequisites.description: None; no prior cybersecurity experience required; basic IT literacy helpful

retake_policy.notes: Quizzes can be retaken; no limit on course re-enrolment; learners progress at their own pace

domains.name: Foundations of Cybersecurity (security domains, NIST frameworks, threat actors)
Security Risk Management (risk frameworks, security audits, NIST RMF)
Networks and Network Security (TCP/IP, firewalls, VPNs, intrusion detection)
Linux and SQL for Security (command line, SQL queries for log analysis)
Assets, Threats, and Vulnerabilities (asset classification, threat modelling, encryption)
Detection and Response (incident lifecycle, SIEM tools, network traffic analysis)
Python Automation for Cybersecurity (scripts for security tasks)

official_study_resources.title: Google Career Certificates — Practice Quizzes (embedded in courses)
Google Career Certificates — Course Readings and Labs
